title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 431.130 - Survival of debt, against whom
text:
431.130.  Survival of debt, against whom. — When all the obligors or promisors shall die, the debt or contract shall survive against the heirs, executors and administrators of all the deceased joint obligors and promisors.
(RSMo 1939 § 3342) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2955; 1919 § 2157; 1909 § 2771
